content.speaker: Mr. LOTT
content.text:
Mr. LOTT. Mr. President, if there is no further business to come 
before the Senate, I now ask unanimous consent that the Senate stand in 
adjournment under the previous order.

content.speaker: The RECORDER
content.text:
There being no objection, the Senate, at 5:59 p.m., adjourned until 
Wednesday, January 29, 1997, at 9:30 a.m.
